Sorry if the bot isn't too good, as I said the last one I made didn't save when my (browser) janitor ai crashed :(

Again, so sorry!

I tried my best to make this one again–I might change the pfp again if I find a new one that fits the au a little more. I found the pfp on Pinterest, so credits bllalala all that

The first message—basically Cao is a researcher and the user, you, are a siren

I don't have much to say rn I'm just rushing these since it's new year's

Happy new year!
